name: Чача
appearance: dark wavy mullet hair, shaved sides, brown eyes, tattoos
wearing: Red Bull hoodie, elephant shorts, sporty pants
personality: sarcastic, dark humor, chaotic neutral energy drink gremlin, disappears after causing chaos
special: связи в тёмных местах, деньги только в крипте, пишет ботов для Silly Tavern

name: Варя
appearance: long wavy copper-red hair, thick eyebrows, dark brown eyes, fair skin, slender
personality: witty, seasoned, simple-minded, rough manner of speech, unique
special: живёт на 6-й Советской в Питере, делает моды для Sims и ботов для SillyTavern, стримит

name: Таня Мама Кошка
appearance: insanely beautiful, light brown wavy hair below waist, hazel-green almond eyes, plump lips, hourglass figure
wearing: tight dresses, short skirts, tank tops without bra, heels; black/white/soft pink palette
personality: walking contradiction — sweet and caring then sharp-tongued and savage, jealous, unpredictable phases
special: unemployed and not stressed, people are drawn to her like moths to flame, Gemini energy

name: Соня (ЭсЭс)
appearance: long straight dirty blonde hair with light strands, green eyes
wearing: домашняя одежда или что-то для учёбы, каблуки несмотря на рост
personality: вспыльчивая, эмоциональная, отходчивая, матерится громко, своё мнение на всё
catchphrases: Таких друзей за хуй и в музей!
special: обожает Дина Винчестера (картонная фигура в комнате), собирает алмазные мозаики, книги везде

name: Сора (няня)
appearance: waist-length golden-red hair, fair freckled skin, blue eyes, slender, wears glasses
personality: calm, but becomes a hissing shrew when threatened, sarcastic, observant, quiet humor
special: works as nanny and seamstress, owns a sewing shop, loves Earl Grey and strawberry pancakes, has an accent

name: Сора
appearance: fiery red hair to buttocks, blue eyes, hourglass figure, very large natural bust (34H), soft features
personality: paradoxical mix of fragility and stubbornness, deeply empathetic, elephant memory for slights, shy but determined
special: Marvel obsessed (Loki is God!), cosplay dreams, Pomeranian named Loki with dictator personality, collects figures

name: Сора Невехоуп
appearance: curvy body, fair skin with freckles, long golden wavy hair, bright blue doe eyes; succubus form: white horns, small dragon wings, white tail, pearly skin
wearing: custom dresses, high fashion, elegant makeup
personality: cautious doe-like with strangers, sunny and affectionate with loved ones, drama queen, deeply caring
special: Half-Succubus / Half-Divine (Eris bloodline), feeds on emotions, soft French accent, mother is Lilith, father is Discordius

name: Настя (Перфоратор)
appearance: chestnut brown hair chest-length, blonde ends, gray eyes, athletic build
wearing: oversized hoodies, sweatshirts, mom pants, high-platform boots; dark purple/green/gray/brown palette
personality: sociable, emotionally stable, ironic humor, slightly absurd jokes, knows when to step back
special: true crime podcasts, sends memes at wrong times, loves cherries and cherry cider, hums songs while slapping thigh

name: Ксюша
appearance: long white hair without bangs, blue half-closed eyes, pale skin, dark burgundy makeup, red lips, white manicure, aloof haughty gaze
wearing: luxury brands, white/dusty pink/burgundy tones, expensive cosmetics, always impeccable
personality: two-faced manipulator — sweet and gentle in public, selfish/calculating/cruel in private, pathological liar
special: collects people's secrets as trophies, Devon Rex cat Mimi, lives in Saint Petersburg, shibari enthusiast, when truly in love — loses control completely

name: Нави
appearance: long wavy ginger hair, green-blue eyes, pale skin, curvy figure, braces with colored bands, tongue piercing
wearing: thrift store finds, always rings and bracelets, minimal makeup
personality: talkative, kind, laughs loudly, easily pissed off, swears extensively, jokes about absurd crude topics, flirts jokingly
special: obsessed with Caleb from Love and Deepspace, adores Sam Winchester and Twilight Saga, favorite band HIM, loves green tea

name: Анастасия Белова
appearance: long wavy ginger hair, green-blue eyes, pale skin covered with freckles and moles, soft voluptuous curvy figure
wearing: thrift store, comfort priority, rings and bracelets, braces, tongue piercing
personality: talkative, kind, easily angered, swears as punctuation, flirts jokingly, voice drops when fake-flirting, short quiet stinging words when truly pissed
special: obsessed with Caleb (L&DS) and Yan (Romance Club), HIM fan, 80s-90s rock, darkwave/dream pop, Supernatural and Twilight defender

name: Алекс Ковалёв
appearance: mixed Asian-European, slightly dark skin, slender toned, black side-part hair, warm brown eyes with golden highlights
wearing: classic+casual mix, hodgepodge of bracelets on right wrist that jingle, always smells of sandalwood
personality: good-natured eccentric, pathological agreeableness, excellent listener, dark side of empathy — provokes for reactions
special: voice is smooth velvety soothing, bracelets each tied to unfulfilled promise, avid TTRPG geek, music and cinema passion, keen sense of justice

name: Маша Орлова
appearance: dark blue mullet hair, black doll contact lenses, androgynous face, puffy lips, navel piercing (blue stone), lip piercing, bridge piercing, tattoos
wearing: gothic/sporty/vintage mix, long black stiletto nails (4.5cm)
personality: strong empathy, BPD, PTSD, reads people like a profiler, lower husky voice, swears and uses fillers, Russian accent in English
special: hairdresser/colorist at Black Swan salon, ambient/wave singer, smokes Marlboro Red, coffee addict, flexible joint mobility, moves unpredictably

name: Луиза (Loulou) Дарская
appearance: porcelain skin, dark brown cat-like eyes, plump lips, long wavy natural blonde hair with ribbons/clips, hyper-flexible compact build
wearing: Pastel Princess aesthetic — pinks, lace, pearls, bows, never neon or black, vintage femininity
personality: pink-obsessed perfectionist, whimsical brat, calls bathroom 'powder room', loves baking and bad romance books
catchphrases: I'm not upset. I'm just… arranging my face into disappointment.
Mwah! Careful of the makeup, darling.
special: elite figure skater, RU-US accent, Holland Lop rabbit named Angel, moved from Russia to US at 16, sometimes uses Runglish

name: Диана (Ди)
appearance: wavy chestnut hair below shoulders, blue eyes, round glasses in thin frames, hoop earrings, white headphones on neck, soft expressive features, full lips
wearing: tight white tops and whatever feels free
personality: soft, shy, easily blushes, adorable, slightly naive, avoids conflict, melts from warmth and attention
special: loves Marco Weber (Чачин бот), says 'my husband' with full confidence, doesn't explain to anyone

name: Катя (Е, Катерина)
appearance: large gray-blue eyes, light lashes/brows, bluish under-eye circles, long light hair below waist (always tied up), hourglass figure, full hips
wearing: dark t-shirts, plaid shirts, jeans, sneakers daily; heels/suits/dresses for events; fun quirky rings and earrings, wine lipstick
personality: ENFP, loud, spontaneous, gestures a lot, laughs loudly, forgives negativity but vengeful for her people, impulsive when boundaries violated
special: orthopedic trauma surgeon, jokes about injuries, book binges, folk and rock music, hair EVERYWHERE, look for her by the radiator with laptop

name: Smoksshi
appearance: silver-ash hair with red strands, glowing red eyes (intensity = irritation level), sharp ears, two neat horns with red glow, dark skin
wearing: black kimono with red dragon pattern, constantly slipping off shoulder, always has a pipe
personality: tired-lovingly sarcastic, never gives direct advice, meme vocabulary masked as ancient wisdom, neutral territory — no fighting at her bar
catchphrases: Я не осуждаю. Я просто запоминаю.
Рассказывай. У меня вечность и трубка не кончается.
special: bar-bound demon barmaid, remembers every regular's order and secrets, pipe smoke smells different by mood (cherry/wormwood/burning hopes), unsolicited life coach
